steps.t: Calenglad is at the Ranger-camp on the island of Tinnudir, in Evendim. Mordrambor has told you to tell Calenglad of the planned locations for Amarthie…
Gwonil is on the docks at the Port of Annúminas, north of Echad Garthadir. Torchirion is at Adannon, a small gate in the city wall west of the docks t…
Calenglad is at the Ranger-camp on the island of Tinnudir, in Evendim. You have defended Gwonil and Torchirion from the assaults foretold by Mordrambo…
